bead.title: availability: Story 8 worker→provider links
bead.description: Cross-link from Workers (Story 8) tab to Agent availability for the worker's provider. Hard dep on Story 8 UI + Story 9 B2.
bead.acceptance: 1. Worker rows link to provider detail page. 2. Provider rows show recent worker count.
